title: codereview general subagent pass 2/3: gateway.rs SCHC buffer
description: General subagent review pass 2/3 for project-LICHEN-hhny. Confirmed no truncation risk for IPv6 packets >1500B as buffer now uses MAX_IPV6_MTU const (4096). Explicit match on tuple variant SchcError::BufferTooSmall(_) follows Rust idiom and existing match arms in file. No changes needed in lichen-schc. Linting and tests verified clean for targeted crates. Only opinion-level style notes (not filed as high-pri). No P0-P2 issues.
